news.title: Xinzhou Technology Launches Next-Generation High-Frequency DC-DC Converters
news.summary: New 4MHz buck converters enable smallest solution size for wearable and IoT applications
news.author: Xinzhou Marketing Team
news.content:
Xinzhou Technology has announced a new generation of ultra-high frequency DC-DC converters designed for space-constrained wearable and IoT applications.

The new product family includes:
- XZ4xxx series with 4MHz switching frequency for smallest solution size
- Enhanced XZ3xxx series with improved light-load efficiency
- New ultra-low Iq LDOs for always-on applications
- Integrated power modules with embedded inductors

Key improvements include:
- Solution size reduced by 30% compared to previous generation
- Quiescent current reduced to <5μA in power-save mode
- Efficiency improved by 2-3% across load range
- Enhanced transient response for processor applications

'These new products represent a significant advancement in power density and efficiency,' said the Xinzhou Product Director. 'Designers can now achieve the smallest possible solution size without compromising performance.'

Samples and evaluation boards are available now through BeiLuo Electronics. Production quantities will be available in Q1 2026.

news.title: Xinzhou Technology and BeiLuo Electronics Announce Strategic Partnership
news.summary: Partnership expands distribution network and technical support for Xinzhou products in China
news.author: BeiLuo Electronics
news.content:
Xinzhou Technology and BeiLuo Electronics have announced a strategic partnership to expand the distribution and support of Xinzhou power management ICs in China.

The partnership includes:
- BeiLuo Electronics becomes authorized distributor for all Xinzhou products
- Dedicated technical support team for Xinzhou product line
- Local inventory stocking for fast delivery
- Joint marketing and technical training programs

'We are thrilled to partner with BeiLuo Electronics,' said Xinzhou Sales VP. 'Their strong technical capabilities and extensive customer relationships make them an ideal partner for our continued growth.'

Customers can now access Xinzhou products with shorter lead times and comprehensive local technical support through BeiLuo Electronics' nationwide network.

news.title: Xinzhou Releases Smartphone Power Management Reference Design
news.summary: Complete 5-rail power solution for smartphones with industry-leading power density
news.author: Xinzhou Applications Team
news.content:
Xinzhou Technology has released a comprehensive reference design for smartphone power management systems, demonstrating best practices for multi-rail power solutions.

The reference design features:
- 5-rail power system (1.0V, 1.2V, 1.8V, 2.8V, 3.3V)
- Total solution size of 25mm x 20mm
- Peak efficiency >93%
- Fast transient response for processor loads
- Intelligent power sequencing

Complete documentation includes:
- Schematic and PCB layout files
- BOM with multiple source options
- Design guide and application notes
- Test reports and characterization data

'This reference design showcases our capabilities in high-density power management,' said the Xinzhou FAE Manager. 'Customers can accelerate their development while achieving best-in-class performance.'

Evaluation kits are available through BeiLuo Electronics for immediate evaluation.

news.title: Xinzhou Products Achieve AEC-Q100 Automotive Qualification
news.summary: Key power management ICs qualified for automotive applications, expanding market opportunities
news.author: Xinzhou Quality Team
news.content:
Xinzhou Technology has successfully completed AEC-Q100 qualification for its XZ2xxx and XZ3xxx DC-DC converter families, enabling their use in automotive electronics applications.

The qualification process included:
- High temperature operating life (HTOL) testing
- Temperature cycling (-40°C to +150°C)
- Early life failure rate (ELFR) testing
- Electrostatic discharge (ESD) characterization

'Achieving AEC-Q100 qualification is a significant milestone,' said the Xinzhou Quality Director. 'It demonstrates our commitment to meeting the stringent quality and reliability requirements of the automotive industry.'

Automotive applications for Xinzhou power ICs include:
- Infotainment systems
- ADAS cameras and sensors
- Body electronics modules
- LED lighting drivers

Automotive-grade products are available now with PPAP documentation support.
